headline: Dell Stock Leads the S&P 500 Today. Next Week’s Earnings Could Send It Higher.
summary: Dell Technologies stock rises, leading the S&P 500. Analysts believe Dell will beat fiscal first-quarter earnings next week, but a strong performance from its AI business is needed.

headline: Networking and hardware poised for gains, Evercore flags top stocks to own
summary: Investing.com -- Hardware and networking stocks are well-positioned heading into earnings season, Evercore ISI said, flagging Dell as its top pick and arguing that resilient demand and higher average selling prices are likely to drive upside across much of its coverage.

headline: Assessing HP (HPQ) Valuation As Share Price Gains Contrast With Weaker One Year Returns
summary: HP (HPQ) is back on investors’ radar after recent trading activity highlighted a sharp contrast between its short term share moves and longer term returns. This has prompted a closer look at how the business currently stacks up. See our latest analysis for HP. Recent trading has been positive, with a 1 day share price return of 3.94% at US$21.90 and a 90 day share price return of 17.81%. However, the 1 year total shareholder return is down 19.27%, suggesting momentum has picked up after a...
